TimeEntry.Title: Re: New IT Request - Disposal of Old PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Heather Whitehead requested assistance with disposing of her son's old PC. The PC, which was previously repaired, is no longer functioning, and she would like to delete any files or information before disposal. She also asked if any additional components (such as keyboard or monitor) were needed for the disposal process.

Actions Taken:

  1. Heather was informed about the data wipe process to ensure all information is securely deleted before disposal.
  2. She confirmed that she would bring the PC and power cord to our office for the disposal process and asked if additional components were needed.
  3. The request was postponed by Heather until further details regarding the project completion date are available. She will reach out once there is more information, likely in the next month.

So closing this ticket for now.
